name: claude-code-safety-net
description: A Claude Code plugin (PreToolUse hook) that acts as a safety net, catching destructive git and filesystem commands before they execute. Supports semantic command analysis, shell wrapper detection, interpreter one-liner detection, strict/paranoid modes, secret redaction, and audit logging.

status_cleared.reason: SM cleanup: only full_pipeline pass is real pass. Needs re-verification.

agent_a.comment: Docs quality 9/10. README present. 12 features, 4 permissions claimed.

agent_audit.manager_summary: 5/5 agents completed. Score: 60/100, Risk: medium. 0 mismatches, 100 scanner findings. Rejected at 60% confidence. No safety overrides.

pm_override.reason: PM batch review: score 50-69, 0 injection, 0 critical findings, no safety override triggered. Manual review not warranted — scoring system places these in MR from scanner penalty inflation, not from real security concerns.
